user.title: PTV Open Data Subscription Key
user.description:
Enter your PTV Open Data **subscription key**.

To get one:
1. Register at [opendata.transport.vic.gov.au]({portal_url})
2. Go to **My Account → Subscription Keys**
3. Copy the key shown there

⚠️ Do **not** use the token from *Data Platform API Tokens* — that is a different system and will be rejected.

downloading.title: Preparing Timetable Data
downloading.description:
Downloading the Transport Victoria timetable (~230 MB) and building the local database. This can take **1–10 minutes** depending on your connection and hardware.

This only happens once — future setups reuse the cached data.

This screen will advance automatically when everything is ready.

importing.title: Preparing Timetable Data
importing.description: Finishing up the timetable database. This screen will advance automatically.

mode.title: Select Transport Mode
mode.description: Choose the type of service you want to track.

dest.title: Select Destination
dest.description:
Choose where you want to go from **{stop_name}**.

**All destinations** is recommended — it shows all departures regardless of direction and handles City Loop direction changes automatically.

entry_type.title: What would you like to add?

vehicle_tracker.title: Vehicle Tracker — Select Station
vehicle_tracker.description: Choose the departure watch (station) this vehicle tracker should follow.

vehicle_tracker_name.title: Vehicle Tracker — Name
vehicle_tracker_name.description: Name this vehicle tracker. It will follow the next vehicle departing from **{station_name}**.

route_tracker_mode.title: Route Tracker — Select Mode
route_tracker_mode.description: Choose the transport mode for the route you want to track.

route_tracker_route.title: Route Tracker — Select Route
route_tracker_route.description: Choose the line or route to track. All vehicles currently running on this route will be shown.

route_tracker_filter.title: Route Tracker — Filter by Location?
route_tracker_filter.description: You can optionally filter to only show vehicles near a specific stop — useful for busy routes with many services.

route_tracker_stop.title: Route Tracker — Reference Stop
route_tracker_stop.description: Choose a stop to use as the centre of your proximity filter.

route_tracker_proximity.title: Route Tracker — Proximity & Vehicle Count
route_tracker_proximity.description: Set how close a vehicle must be to the reference stop, and how many tracker slots to create.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid subscription key. Check your key at opendata.transport.vic.gov.au → My Account → Subscription Keys. Note: Data Platform API Tokens will not work here.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the PTV API. Check your network connection and try again.
error.db_not_ready: Timetable data is still being prepared. Please wait a minute and try again.
error.no_stops_found: No stops found. Try a different search term.
error.no_home_zone: No Home zone configured in Home Assistant. Set your home location in Settings → System → General.
error.no_stops_near_location: No stops found within 500 m of the selected location. Try zooming in closer.
error.location_required: Please pick a location on the map.
error.no_direct_service: No direct service found between these two stops. Try a different destination or use All destinations.
error.invalid_route: Route not found. Please select a route from the list.

abort.no_routes_found: No routes found for this transport mode. Make sure the timetable data has been imported.
abort.no_watches: No departure watches found. Add a Station Departures entry first, then add a Vehicle Tracker.
